commands.description: Map of command names to their configuration

autostart.description: Whether to start this command automatically on activation (defaults to true)

autoRestart.description: Whether to restart this command on crash with exponential backoff (defaults to false)

interactive.description: Whether this command requires interactive terminal input (defaults to false)

cwd.description: Working directory relative to workspace root

watch.description: Glob patterns of files to watch — restarts command on change
